title: Technique Level 1A — Foundations
summary: Five-finger C major foundation exercises in single-hand format. Introduces whole, half, and quarter notes in 4/4, 3/4, and 2/4 time, training both right and left hand independently in the C position (C–G).

exercises.title: Five-Finger Warm-Up — Whole Notes Up (RH)
exercises.summary: Right hand ascends from C4 to G4 one whole note per measure.
exercises.goal: Establish C position fingering (1–2–3–4–5) with even whole-note tone.

exercises.title: Five-Finger Warm-Up — Whole Notes Down (RH)
exercises.summary: Right hand descends from G4 to C4 one whole note per measure.
exercises.goal: Practice descending C position with finger independence on each whole note.

exercises.title: Half Notes Ascending (RH)
exercises.summary: Right hand plays C position pairs in half notes, rising then returning.
exercises.goal: Play two half notes per measure smoothly, lifting the wrist slightly between notes.

exercises.title: Half Notes Descending (RH)
exercises.summary: Right hand descends from G4 in half-note pairs, practicing smooth downward motion.
exercises.goal: Control descent through the five-finger position with even half-note weight.

exercises.title: Quarter Notes Ascending (RH)
exercises.summary: Right hand runs through C position in quarter notes, ascending then descending.
exercises.goal: Play four quarter notes per measure with even rhythm and steady tempo.

exercises.title: Quarter Notes Descending (RH)
exercises.summary: Right hand descends from G4 through C position in quarter notes.
exercises.goal: Maintain even quarter-note timing while descending the five-finger scale.

exercises.title: Quarter Notes Up and Down (RH)
exercises.summary: Right hand climbs then descends C position across four measures.
exercises.goal: Connect ascending and descending five-finger motion smoothly at a steady quarter-note pulse.

exercises.title: C Position in 3/4 — Half and Quarter (RH)
exercises.summary: Right hand plays C position notes in waltz-like 3/4 time: half note then quarter note per measure.
exercises.goal: Feel the 3/4 pulse while moving through the five-finger C position.

exercises.title: C Position in 2/4 — Quarter Notes (RH)
exercises.summary: Right hand plays two quarter notes per measure through C position in march-time 2/4.
exercises.goal: Develop steady two-beat pulse in the right hand through the five-finger position.

exercises.title: Mixed Whole and Half Notes (RH)
exercises.summary: Right hand alternates whole notes and half-note pairs through C position.
exercises.goal: Distinguish whole-note and half-note durations clearly in C position.

exercises.title: Five-Finger Warm-Up — Whole Notes Up (LH)
exercises.summary: Left hand ascends from C3 to G3 one whole note per measure.
exercises.goal: Establish left-hand C position (5–4–3–2–1) with even whole-note tone in bass clef.

exercises.title: Five-Finger Warm-Up — Whole Notes Down (LH)
exercises.summary: Left hand descends from G3 to C3 one whole note per measure.
exercises.goal: Practice descending left-hand C position with independent finger control.

exercises.title: Half Notes Ascending (LH)
exercises.summary: Left hand plays C3 position pairs in half notes, ascending then returning.
exercises.goal: Move through left-hand C3 position in half notes with a relaxed wrist.

exercises.title: Half Notes Descending (LH)
exercises.summary: Left hand descends from G3 in half-note pairs through C position.
exercises.goal: Control descending half-note motion with even weight in the left hand.

exercises.title: Quarter Notes Ascending (LH)
exercises.summary: Left hand runs through C3 position in quarter notes, ascending then descending.
exercises.goal: Play four quarter notes per measure evenly in left-hand C position.

exercises.title: Quarter Notes Descending (LH)
exercises.summary: Left hand descends from G3 through C position in quarter notes.
exercises.goal: Maintain even quarter-note timing while descending the left-hand five-finger scale.

exercises.title: Quarter Notes Up and Down (LH)
exercises.summary: Left hand climbs then descends C3 position across four measures.
exercises.goal: Connect ascending and descending five-finger motion in the left hand at a steady pulse.

exercises.title: C Position in 3/4 — Half and Quarter (LH)
exercises.summary: Left hand plays C3 position notes in 3/4 time: half note then quarter note per measure.
exercises.goal: Feel the 3/4 pulse in the left hand while moving through the five-finger C3 position.

exercises.title: C Position in 2/4 — Quarter Notes (LH)
exercises.summary: Left hand plays two quarter notes per measure through C3 position in 2/4.
exercises.goal: Develop a steady two-beat pulse in the left hand through the five-finger C3 position.

exercises.title: Mixed Whole and Half Notes (LH)
exercises.summary: Left hand alternates whole notes and half-note pairs through C3 position.
exercises.goal: Distinguish whole-note and half-note durations clearly in the left-hand C3 position.
